data.name: Vae Victis - Khan
data.detailed_description:
A prince, an escaped prisoner, a usurper, a brute, a fighter. Karder Dal-Arouya is many things but has one goal in life: to conquer the empire stolen from him by his treacherous queen mother.

Guide Karder on his adventures to reclaim his throne. On his quests you will meet friends and foes, powerful beasts and sexy rulers. Dominate your defeated foes and decide whether you want to use them for your dark pleasures or seduce them to aid you with their skills and knowledge.

Each new release will include a new fiefdom to conquer, new ruler to defeat and abuse (or seduce and recruit) and a miniquest offering unique combats, unforgettable sexual encounters and fun puzzles.

Vae victis - khan offers the following features:

  • Alluring rulers to defeat and decide their fate: whether to abuse them in your dungeons or to recruit them to your council and eventually seduce them

  • Quick and unique Rock, Scissors, Paper based one on one combat with some interesting twists such as aggressive or defensive attacks, subdue attacks for taking your (sexy) opponents unharmed and more.

  • Fiefdom management aspect: increase your Troops and Gold reserves so you can wage wars on new fiefdoms but monitor your fiefdoms Morale and Obedience lest you lose them to rebellions.

  • Miniquests for sabotaging enemy fiefdoms, obtaining powerful magical artifacts and more. Some characters you'll meet in those quests can be revisited later, allowing you to see how meeting you altered the course of their lives.

  • Strong impregnation theme, most sexual encounters will elaborate on Karder's desire to dominate and breed his defeated opponents.

  • As the game progresses, we release additional fiefdoms (and wenches) to conquer, elaborate on the back story and introduce additional features such as enhanced army combat and more.

Vae victis - Khan is a very NSFW game. Its protagonist is a complete bastard who doesn't hesitate to abuse and exploit other people but you will (almost) always have the option to choose a mild (yet highly erotic) path as well. There is no gore or blood during the sexual scenes of the game but other than that Karder can be a total sadist.

data.short_description: Conquest and seduction, sexual dominance and fiefdom management; Forging an empire is a brutal business where you must balance the needs of your budding Khaganate with your own desires. In this revenge story meets an empire simulator, the risks are high but the bounties are heavenly...
data.supported_languages: 英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.4 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04, Kernel 3.x, or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
